originalTitle: US imposes sanctions on DR Congo ex-President Kabila alleging rebel support
title: US imposes sanctions on DR Congo ex-President Kabila alleging rebel support
content: The former leader has not responded to US accusations that he is aiming to destabilise the government.

originalTitle: China scraps tariffs for all but one African nation
title: China scraps tariffs for all but one African nation
content: The zero-tariff regime gives China's soft power a boost, but may lead to uneven gains, say analysts.

originalTitle: Man sentenced to death for murder of toddlers at Ugandan nursery
title: Man sentenced to death for murder of toddlers at Ugandan nursery
content: Christopher Okello Onyum had pleaded insanity but this was dismissed by the judge.

originalTitle: Turkish police fire tear gas, arrest hundreds at May Day rally
title: Turkish police fire tear gas, arrest hundreds at May Day rally
content: Turkish authorities violently crackdown on May Day demonstrations at Istanbul’s Taksim Square, firing tear gas.

originalTitle: Italian firefighters respond to Tuscany wildfires
title: Italian firefighters respond to Tuscany wildfires
content: Wildfires have ravaged over 810 hectares (2,000 acres) of forest in Tuscany.

originalTitle: Cricket club bans social media comments to protect players’ mental health
title: Cricket club bans social media comments to protect players’ mental health
content: English basement county, Kent, are led by former international Adam Hollioake, who is concerned for players' well being.

originalTitle: Billions of meals at risk due to Iran war, says fertiliser boss
title: Billions of meals at risk due to Iran war, says fertiliser boss
content: A shortage of fertiliser due to the Iran conflict could reduce crop yields and push prices higher, says the boss of Yara.

originalTitle: Hegseth says clock paused on deadline to seek approval for Iran war
title: Hegseth says clock paused on deadline to seek approval for Iran war
content: The US defence secretary says the timer for the president to report to Congress "pauses or stops" in a ceasefire.

originalTitle: Violence in Australian town after arrest of man over girl's murder
title: Violence in Australian town after arrest of man over girl's murder
content: Unrest took place outside hospital where man suspected of murdering a five-year-old girl was being treated.

originalTitle: 'It's like we're all crying and relegated' - Spurs' De Zerbi delivers monologue
title: 'It's like we're all crying and relegated' - Spurs' De Zerbi delivers monologue
content: Manager Roberto de Zerbi urges Tottenham to "silence the voice inside of us" as the club battle to avoid relegation from the Premier League.

originalTitle: Saudi Arabian owners' desire for Newcastle 'unchanged'
title: Saudi Arabian owners' desire for Newcastle 'unchanged'
content: Head coach Eddie Howe says Newcastle's owners remain "ambitious" for the club despite the Saudi Arabian PIF's decision to pull out of funding LIV Golf.

originalTitle: Why was Mudryk given ban in secret and what happens now?
title: Why was Mudryk given ban in secret and what happens now?
content: Chelsea winger Mykhailo Mudryk is appealing against a four-year doping ban but why has the process been kept secret, and what happens now?
